_comment: Dead Camera Studios · Seedance Studio · Preset library. Cada 'prompt' es texto cinematográfico inyectado al prompt final. Los grades están calibrados al DNA visual de las 4 películas de referencia de DCS.

lens.label: 24mm Wide
lens.prompt: shot on a 24mm wide lens, expansive framing with subtle edge distortion, deep depth of field

lens.label: 35mm Classic
lens.prompt: shot on a 35mm lens, natural human perspective, balanced framing, classic cinema feel

lens.label: 50mm Portrait
lens.prompt: shot on a 50mm lens, intimate perspective, clean subject isolation, natural compression

lens.label: 85mm Tele
lens.prompt: shot on an 85mm lens, creamy shallow depth of field, compressed background, cinematic bokeh

camera.label: Arri Alexa 65
camera.prompt: captured on Arri Alexa 65, rich dynamic range, organic highlight rolloff, filmic skin tones

camera.label: Red Komodo 6K
camera.prompt: captured on Red Komodo 6K, crisp detail, deep contrast, modern digital clarity

camera.label: Sony Venice
camera.prompt: captured on Sony Venice, cinematic wide gamut, smooth highlight handling, premium color science

camera.label: 16mm Film
camera.prompt: shot on 16mm celluloid film, visible grain structure, slight halation, analog imperfection and warmth

colorGrading.label: Blade Runner 2049
colorGrading.prompt: Blade Runner 2049 grade, tungsten-amber smog atmosphere, neon-soaked pollution haze, deep orange-to-black gradient skies, crushed blacks with detail retained in shadows, high micro-contrast, volumetric god-rays cutting through dust, Deakins-inspired dystopian futurism, muted cyan accents in metal and glass, saturated amber dominant highlights

colorGrading.label: The Matrix
colorGrading.prompt: The Matrix grade, green-phosphor CRT wash over entire frame, monochromatic digital-rain cast, sickly fluorescent green midtones, crushed blacks with no warm tones, desaturated skin tones pushed toward algae-green, cold sterile digital-world palette, slight chromatic fringing, contrasty simulation aesthetic, every highlight tinted emerald-lime

colorGrading.label: Gone Girl
colorGrading.prompt: Gone Girl grade, Fincher teal-green underexposure, clinical desaturated palette, muted skin tones pulled cold, shadows crushed to near-black with subtle cyan lift, yellow-green cast in highlights, surgical flat contrast, Jeff Cronenweth-inspired restraint, ugly-beautiful suburban menace, low-saturation controlled color space

colorGrading.label: Interstellar
colorGrading.prompt: Interstellar grade, Hoyte van Hoytema naturalism, cold blue deep-space void contrasted with warm amber practical lights, corn-field golden-hour warmth, IMAX 65mm texture, crushed blacks with filmic grain, skin tones honest and slightly warm, awe-inducing negative space, halation around light sources, reverent cosmic atmosphere

cameraMotion.label: Static Lock-off
cameraMotion.prompt: camera remains completely static and locked-off throughout, no tracking, no shake, no push-in, the frame is fixed, only subjects inside the frame move

cameraMotion.label: Slow Dolly-in
cameraMotion.prompt: slow deliberate dolly-in toward the subject, smooth mechanical motion, tension building as the frame compresses, no handheld shake

cameraMotion.label: Orbit
cameraMotion.prompt: smooth continuous orbit around the subject, steady arc motion maintaining consistent distance, revealing spatial context, gimbal-stabilized

cameraMotion.label: Handheld
cameraMotion.prompt: handheld camera with organic subtle shake, human breathing rhythm, slight micro-adjustments in framing, verité documentary energy

genre.label: Drama
genre.prompt: dramatic cinematic atmosphere, emotional weight in composition, deliberate pacing, restrained performance focus

genre.label: Action
genre.prompt: kinetic action energy, dynamic composition, heightened physicality, urgent visual rhythm

genre.label: Noir
genre.prompt: neo-noir atmosphere, hard shadows, chiaroscuro lighting, morally ambiguous mood, rain-slicked surfaces and reflective darkness

genre.label: Horror
genre.prompt: horror atmosphere, oppressive dread, negative space used as threat, unnatural stillness, dim underexposed ambience
